rationale: The cited paper appears theoretically central: it proposes a general-motivation account where sampling broadens later reward-seeking, while the citing paper’s research question explicitly tests selective complement-goal activation against a “general reward-drive activation” account. The citing note says it “refines prior sensitization and motivation accounts,” which aligns directly with the cited paper’s core mechanism and findings. This looks like a substantive conceptual comparison/foundation rather than an incidental mention.
